name: strimzi
explanation: Strimzi is a Kubernetes Kafka operator. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and scrapes up to three Prometheus endpoints exposed by Strimzi components: cluster_operator (default :8080/metrics), topic_operator (default :8080/metrics), and user_operator (default :8081/metrics). The spec example URLs hard-code these conventional ports/paths and the endpoints are unauthenticated by Strimzi default. At least one endpoint must be set, but each is a standard /metrics path on a well-known port — a fit for a generic OpenMetrics port scan in-cluster.
notes: Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port), but with up to three distinct operator endpoints rather than one. Discovery should probe :8080/metrics (cluster + topic) and :8081/metrics (user) on Strimzi operator pods.
